name: training_dataset_diag_commands_v1
description: CLI contract training data for aosctl train, dataset, and diag command families. Covers training run lifecycle, dataset validation and upload, and diagnostic health/metrics/replay/determinism workflows.

entries.notes: 400 examples spanning aosctl train (130), aosctl dataset (130), and aosctl diag (140) command families with realistic output representations

provenance.review_notes: Grounded in train_cli.rs, datasets.rs, and diag.rs source; output formats match OutputWriter kv/success/info/section conventions

evaluation_gates: Train start command includes job_id in success output
Dataset ingest shows dataset_id, dataset_version_id, trust_state
Diag health output includes component status and overall pass/fail
Error messages match actual error codes (DATASET_TRUST_BLOCKED, LINEAGE_REQUIRED, etc)
JSON flag examples produce machine-readable output
Cancel and status commands show correct run_id handling
intent: Teach the adapter the full aosctl train/dataset/diag command surface: argument patterns, success output formats, validation error messages, JSON mode, and common failure modes.
